title: Creating a Persona for a Sustainable Fashion Designer
scenario: Design a persona for a sustainable fashion designer who is passionate about eco-friendly fashion practices and is looking to create clothing lines that minimize waste and promote recycling. The designer's name is Maya, and they are 28 years old. The persona should include demographics, goals, challenges, and pain points. Ensure the persona is 150-300 words, written in the first person, and is focused on the designer's sustainable fashion practices. Use a professional tone and a creative style.
constraints: Must be written in the first person

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona description accurately reflect the provided context?
Is the tone of the persona description creative and professional?
Is the persona description within the specified word count range?
